title: noticastrum gnaphalioides
intro: Noticastrum gnaphalioides, also known as the "sourbush," is a shrub native to South Africa, characterized by its small, yellow flowers and bitter leaves. The medicinal properties of Noticastrum gnaphalioides lie in its ability to act as a purgative, helping to expel intestinal parasites and alleviate digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Noticastrum gnaphalioides can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
